\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Concrete domain for homogeneous 3D media. 

Responsibilities beyond those of \doxylink{classDomain}{Domain}\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Hold constant material parameters (epsilon, mu).
\item Build a homogeneous Green\textquotesingle{}s function (\doxylink{classGreenFHom3D}{Green\+FHom3D}).
\item Provide homogeneous Epsilon/\+Mu queries.
\item Instantiate a PMCHWT formulation for assembly.
\item Implement cross‑section post‑processing via triangle quadrature. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition at line \mbox{\hyperlink{DomainHom3D_8h_source_l00031}{31}} of file \mbox{\hyperlink{DomainHom3D_8h_source}{Domain\+Hom3\+D.\+h}}.
